properties.name: Great Dyke Study Area
properties.description: Covers the main Great Dyke layered intrusion from Mvurwi in the north to Wedza in the south, Zimbabwe. Includes the main chromite and PGM bearing ultramafic layers.
properties.geological_context: 2.58 Ga layered mafic-ultramafic intrusion, 550km long, 4-12km wide. Major chromitite seams in the ultramafic sequence. PGM-bearing Main Sulphide Zone near the top of the ultramafic sequence.
